# Spanish-Language SBDC Route

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

## Reusable BOSS response pattern If the user prefers Spanish, route to Spanish webinars and note Spanish-language advising preference in the handoff. Use simple language and ask whether they prefer the handoff in English or Spanish. ## Handoff fields to capture

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns exit and transition, marketing, mentoring and advising during Ideation, Exit and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.
